scenarios.title: Fuel reconciliation drift contracts present
scenarios.stdout:
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:1:-- Migration 012: Fuel L0 valuation reconciler + drift view
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:71:    usd_estimated,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:72:    usd_settled,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:84:    (p.units * p.price_per_unit) as usd_estimated,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:85:    null::numeric as usd_settled,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:106:      usd_estimated = excluded.usd_estimated,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:111:        when fuel_valuations.usd_settled is not null then fuel_valuations.precision_level
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:115:        when fuel_valuations.usd_settled is not null then fuel_valuations.confidence
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:120:    where fuel_valuations.usd_settled is null;
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:127:-- Daily drift summary for observability.
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:128:create or replace view fuel_valuation_drift_v1 as
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:135:  sum(coalesce(fv.usd_estimated, 0)) as usd_estimated_total,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:136:  sum(coalesce(fv.usd_settled, 0)) as usd_settled_total,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:137:  sum(coalesce(fv.usd_settled, fv.usd_estimated, 0)) as usd_effective_total,
logic.logline.world/supabase/migrations/20260305000012_fuel_l0_reconciler.sql:138:  sum(coalesce(fv.usd_settled, 0) - coalesce(fv.usd_estimated, 0)) as usd_drift_total
